title: Prevention of chikungunya - Canada.ca
content:
## Prevention of chikungunya

## How can chikungunya infections be prevented?
If you are planning to travel to an area where chikungunya occurs, you should take the proper precautions.
Canada has approved the use of a vaccine for those travelling to destinations where chikungunya is present.
Preferably 6 weeks before you leave consult a health care provider or visit a travel health clinic to:
- get personalized health advice and recommendations
- determine if travel vaccines may be right for you
You can help prevent the disease by protecting yourself from mosquito bites, especially during peak biting periods. These occur just after sunrise and before sunset.
- Insect bite and pest prevention
- Travel health notices
- World Health Organization: Chikungunya
- Poster - Mosquito bite prevention for travellers
